import io
import string

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut found = -1
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 61 and found == -1
        found = i
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found > 0
    let key = string.substring(line, 0, found)
    let value = string.substring(line, found + 1, n)
    println("#{key}:#{value}")
  end
end

mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
